summary: Soundboard recording of the 1979 Red Rocks show with mixed quality and a notable lineup change after the Godchaux era
review: The single review points out that this 1979 Red Rocks performance marks a shift from the previous year, highlighting the departure of the Godchauxs. Recording-wise the reviewer is unsure who was at the board and jokes about Betty missing the bus, suggesting an uncertain sound quality typical of a soundboard source.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one moderate‑rated review (3 stars) mentions both performance and recording aspects, leading to an average overall assessment.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer is uncertain about the board operator (possible absence of Betty Cantor‑Jackson), implying no clear comment on clarity but suggesting a typical soundboard capture with unknown consistency.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; the only noted point is the lineup change after Keith and Donna Godchaux left.
